observedSectionWindows.note: Front matter, disclaimer, products covered, and common practice guidance.
C-3 Phase I / C-3 Phase II / AG 43 differences and early model comparison material.
Types of models / granularity and starting-assets discussion.
Scenario generators, calibration, fund modeling, and economic assumptions.
Assumption closeout, revenue-sharing bridge, and interpolation details.
Standard Scenario mechanics and tail-risk closeout before reinsurance begins.
Allocation of the aggregate reserves to the contract level.
Peer review and working with a peer reviewer.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single practice note file.
Do not widen into the other Practice Notes files in the same folder.
Keep AG 43, C-3 Phase II, VM-20, VM-21, VM-22, VM-30, VM-31, and NY regulation references review-only unless the batch intentionally includes the referenced operational text.
Keep the disclaimer and the non-binding status visible as companion-guidance context, not as authoritative regulatory text.
Use page locators as the primary citation anchor; line references are not expected for this PDF slice.
Keep a page-image wording backstop visible because the text layer is dense in places and the closing checklist / revenue-sharing sections need cautious wording.
exclusions: No full-document processing outside this source file.
No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other Practice Notes files in the same wave.
